title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: virt-v2v bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for virt-v2v is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Kernel-based Virtual Machine (KVM) offers a full virtualization solution forLinux on numerous hardware platforms. The virt:rhel module contains packageswhich provide user-space components used to run virtual machines using KVM.The packages also provide APIs for managing and interacting with the virtualized systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Change nbdkit-file-plugin cache=none to cache=default [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-135832)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for virt-v2v is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Kernel-based Virtual Machine (KVM) offers a full virtualization solution forLinux on numerous hardware platforms. The virt:rhel module contains packageswhich provide user-space components used to run virtual machines using KVM.The packages also provide APIs for managing and interacting with the virtualized systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Change nbdkit-file-plugin cache=none to cache=default [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-135832)
